summary: Leavitt Partners provides comments and best practices drawn from multiple digital health alliances and collaborations to inform the HTI-5 proposed rule. Their input reflects broad multi-sector perspectives on interoperability and health IT deregulatory actions.
key_arguments: Input is based on extensive multi-sector digital health alliances experience
Collaboration across diverse stakeholders is critical for effective health IT policy
Best practices should guide deregulatory actions to balance innovation and safety
recommendations: Consider insights from multi-sector digital health alliances in finalizing deregulatory actions
Leverage best practices from collaborative initiatives to ensure interoperability and quality
notable_quote: Comments and best practices from Leavitt Partners based on various multi-sector digital health alliances
